privileged_info_summary: I have completed the PI audit by verifying that the task involves creating a new custom Wazuh rule with purely synthetic, instruction-driven parameters. The task.json and setup_task.sh explicitly enforce a target rule ID of 100010, severity level 9, parent SID of 5710, and a description of 'Invalid SSH user detected - potential unauthorized access attempt', directly matching the metadata claims.
